disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Total thyroidectomy 6 months ago, and ran out of prescribed calcium and vitamin D supplements 3 days ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any operations or ongoing medical conditions?
Are you taking any regular medicines, and have you missed any recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had my whole thyroid removed 6 months ago for a goitre and I take calcium and vitamin D tablets, but I ran out 3 days ago and haven't been able to get more.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Perioral numbness and tingling of the lips and fingers
trigger_question_examples: Where do you feel the numbness?
Any tingling around your mouth or hands?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't feel my lips properly and there's pins-and-needles around my mouth and in my fingers.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Painful carpopedal spasm — hands and feet cramped and locked into a flexed position
trigger_question_examples: What are your hands and feet doing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hands have clamped shut and won't open and my feet are cramping hard — it's really painful and I can't control it.

trigger_question_examples: Is your face moving on its own?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My face keeps twitching by itself — I can't stop it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Subjective breathing difficulty / sensation of not getting a proper breath
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel like I can't get a proper breath and I'm frightened my throat might tighten up.
